<GENERATOR-INSTRUMENT>ALMA_Band7: ALMA (Atacama Large Millimeter/submillimeter Array) is a mm/sub-mm interferometer located on the Chajnantor plateau (Chile) at 5000 meters. High-resolution spectroscopy is provided in the 31-950 GHz via a set of ten receivers / bands / frontends, combined with a versatile correlator backend configuration. Highest spectral resolution is 7.6 kHz, and highest spatial resolution is 10 milliarcseconds. Band-7 samples the 275-373 GHz range employing SIS receivers.
